content.query:
SELECT order_id, COUNT(*) AS item_count
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://olistecommstorageaccount.dfs.core.windows.net/olist-ecomm-data/bronze/olist_order_items_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE
) AS items_check
WHERE order_id IN (
    '001ab0a7578dd66cd4b0a71f5b6e1e41',
    '008d9bf350ff02ed444b3452cf3f57e0',
    '002f98c0f7efd42638ed6100ca699b42',
    '009905140e9f8cc35d5be897937381db',
    '00c00d5b36157595e21108ba1da2828f'
)
GROUP BY order_id;
